mapper.sql: select sc.*, coalesce(cm.carrier_mapping_count, 0) as carrier_mapping_count, coalesce(wb.warehouse_count, 0) as warehouse_count, coalesce(cm.carrier_account_summary, '') as carrier_account_summary, coalesce(wb.warehouse_summary, '') as warehouse_summary, case when os.setting_id is null then '未配置' else '已配置' end as order_rule_summary from logistics_system_channel sc left join ( select m.system_channel_code, count(1) as carrier_mapping_count, group_concat(distinct c.connection_name order by c.connection_name separator '、') as carrier_account_summary from logistics_carrier_channel_mapping m join logistics_carrier_connection c on c.carrier_account_id = m.carrier_account_id group by m.system_channel_code ) cm on cm.system_channel_code = sc.system_channel_code left join ( select system_channel_code, count(1) as warehouse_count, group_concat(warehouse_name order by warehouse_name separator '、') as warehouse_summary from logistics_system_channel_warehouse group by system_channel_code ) wb on wb.system_channel_code = sc.system_channel_code left join logistics_system_channel_order_setting os on os.system_channel_code = sc.system_channel_code
mapper.update: update logistics_system_channel set system_channel_name = #{systemChannelName}, fulfillment_mode = #{fulfillmentMode}, standard_carrier_code = #{standardCarrierCode}, signature_services = #{signatureServices}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where system_channel_code = #{systemChannelCode}
update logistics_system_channel set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where system_channel_code = #{systemChannelCode}
mapper.select: select m.*, c.provider_kind, c.connection_name from logistics_carrier_channel_mapping m join logistics_carrier_connection c on c.carrier_account_id = m.carrier_account_id where m.system_channel_code = #{systemChannelCode} order by c.connection_name asc, m.external_channel_name_snapshot asc, m.mapping_id desc
select * from logistics_system_channel_warehouse where system_channel_code = #{systemChannelCode} order by warehouse_name asc, binding_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into logistics_system_channel_warehouse( system_channel_code, warehouse_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_kind, status, shipper_address_mode, external_shipper_code, shipper_company_name, shipper_contact_name, shipper_contact_phone, shipper_contact_email, shipper_country_code, shipper_state_province, shipper_city, shipper_postal_code, shipper_address_line1, shipper_address_line2, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{systemChannelCode}, #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{warehouseKind}, #{status}, #{shipperAddressMode}, #{externalShipperCode}, #{shipperCompanyName}, #{shipperContactName}, #{shipperContactPhone}, #{shipperContactEmail}, #{shipperCountryCode}, #{shipperStateProvince}, #{shipperCity}, #{shipperPostalCode}, #{shipperAddressLine1}, #{shipperAddressLine2}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update logistics_system_channel_warehouse set warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, warehouse_kind = #{warehouseKind}, status = #{status}, shipper_address_mode = #{shipperAddressMode}, external_shipper_code = #{externalShipperCode}, shipper_company_name = #{shipperCompanyName}, shipper_contact_name = #{shipperContactName}, shipper_contact_phone = #{shipperContactPhone}, shipper_contact_email = #{shipperContactEmail}, shipper_country_code = #{shipperCountryCode}, shipper_state_province = #{shipperStateProvince}, shipper_city = #{shipperCity}, shipper_postal_code = #{shipperPostalCode}, shipper_address_line1 = #{shipperAddressLine1}, shipper_address_line2 = #{shipperAddressLine2}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where system_channel_code = #{systemChannelCode} and binding_id = #{bindingId}
mapper.select: select * from logistics_system_channel_order_setting where system_channel_code = #{systemChannelCode} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into logistics_system_channel_order_setting( system_channel_code, destination_countries, min_weight, max_weight, max_length, max_width, max_height, max_girth, signature_service, validation_mode, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{systemChannelCode}, #{destinationCountries}, #{minWeight}, #{maxWeight}, #{maxLength}, #{maxWidth}, #{maxHeight}, #{maxGirth}, #{signatureService}, #{validationMode}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} ) on duplicate key update destination_countries = values(destination_countries), min_weight = values(min_weight), max_weight = values(max_weight), max_length = values(max_length), max_width = values(max_width), max_height = values(max_height), max_girth = values(max_girth), signature_service = values(signature_service), validation_mode = values(validation_mode), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = sysdate(), remark = values(remark)
